title: werauhia kupperiana
intro: Werauhia kupperiana, also known as the Kupper's Werauhia, is a species of plant in the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the pineapple family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Werauhia kupperiana have been found to help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, providing relief and promoting overall respiratory health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction to be consumed, offering a natural and herbal remedy for various respiratory ailments.
